backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining user profiles, access control, and CRUD operations for surgery cases with types and comparison helpers.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features, associated files, components, tests, and confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-like mapping of frontend file paths to short technical descriptions of their functionality.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_NOTES.md: Documentation explaining when and how to perform a deterministic frontend redeploy with backend binding updates.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining theme variables and dark mode styles for the application.
frontend/index.html: App entry HTML including links to generated dog‑cat app icons and main script mount point.
frontend/redeploy.sh: Script performing deterministic frontend redeploy including clean rebuild, deployment, and summary output.
Script that removes stale build artifacts, installs dependencies, regenerates backend bindings, and validates them.
frontend/scripts/verify-live-backend-bin: Guide describing how to confirm that deployed frontend uses fresh backend bindings and correct canister IDs.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component handling authentication, backend connection, profile setup, case modals, search, and sorting.
frontend/src/components/auth/Authorizati: Displays a banner for authorization errors and lets the user grant themselves access.
frontend/src/components/cases/CameraCapt: Empty placeholder file for a camera capture component.
frontend/src/components/cases/CaseCard.t: Displays a surgery case card with demographics, dates, tasks, and edit/delete actions.
frontend/src/components/cases/CaseForm.t: Form for creating or editing a surgery case with prefill logic, validation, and submission handling.
frontend/src/components/cases/CaseList.t: Fetches, filters, sorts, and displays surgery cases, handling loading and server error states.
Reusable date input with a calendar popover and validation.
frontend/src/components/cases/Demographi: Textarea that extracts and auto-fills demographics when pasted content is detected.
frontend/src/components/cases/EmptyCases: Displays an empty state for cases with optional migration guidance and dynamic messaging based on auth and connection status.
frontend/src/components/cases/ServerCase: Shows a server load error with retry support and handles authorization errors via a recovery banner.
frontend/src/components/cases/SortContro: Provides UI controls for selecting sort field and toggling sort direction for cases.
frontend/src/components/cases/SpeciesInd: Renders a colored species badge based on species text, showing the first letter as an icon.
frontend/src/components/cases/TasksCheck: Displays required, incomplete tasks with optional highlighting and allows toggling task completion.
frontend/src/components/csv/CsvExportBut: Exports current cases to a CSV file and triggers a download with success or error toasts.
frontend/src/components/csv/CsvImportDia: Handles CSV file upload, parsing, validation, and importing cases into local storage with status feedback.
frontend/src/components/errors/BackendCo: Shows a troubleshooting banner for backend connection failures with guidance and retry actions.
frontend/src/components/errors/ModalErro: Error boundary for modal content that logs errors and shows a fallback with a close button.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the app footer with branding, current year, and a caffeine.ai referral link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Renders the app header with branding and login/logout handling using Internet Identity and environment label display.
frontend/src/components/startup/StartupR: Displays a recovery screen for startup errors with contextual guidance and retry/reload options.
frontend/src/components/sync/SyncStatusB: Shows online status, backend connectivity, and sync controls with error feedback and retry logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor instance tied to the current identity and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorWithError.ts: Wraps useActor to add error tracking, classification, and retry behavior during actor initialization.
Determines backend connection status by combining actor initialization with a ping probe and provides retry functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useCasesStore.ts: Manages merged local and server surgery cases with add/update mutations and automatic local persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useEnvironmentLabel.t: Returns a Draft or Live environment label based on hostname heuristics.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts: Tracks the browser's online/offline status and returns a boolean state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Wraps backend actor calls with React Query for user profiles and paginated surgery case fetching, plus mutations for saving and granting access.
frontend/src/hooks/useSync.ts: Synchronizes local surgery cases with the backend using pagination, merging, normalization, and local persistence updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS layers and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility to merge Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/cases.ts: Defines types for local surgery cases and case form data, extending backend types with local-only fields.
Provides utilities to classify backend errors into user-facing categories and messages.
frontend/src/utils/csv.ts: Implements CSV export and parsing for surgery cases, including validation, task column handling, and date conversions.
frontend/src/utils/dates.ts: Provides validation and conversion utilities for YYYY-MM-DD date strings, including nanosecond conversion, display formatting, and age calculation.
frontend/src/utils/demographicsExtract.t: Parses pasted text to extract structured patient demographics using regex and fallback heuristics.
frontend/src/utils/draftAdminToken.ts: Retrieves and checks the presence of a persisted draft admin token from URL or sessionStorage.
frontend/src/utils/localPersistence.ts: Loads, saves, and clears locally stored surgery cases with bigint handling and field normalization.
frontend/src/utils/mergeCases.ts: Merges local and server surgery cases while preserving local-only fields and prepares cases for sync.
frontend/src/utils/prefill.ts: Finds the most recent case for an MRN and extracts demographic prefill data from it.
frontend/src/utils/tasksChecklist.ts: Defines task checklist structure and provides functions to create, normalize, and query required tasks.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Handles reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters with session persistence and hash routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom color variables, container settings, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, existing features, new feature requests, and image requirements for the VetCase Tracker app.
